A.A: Spend 5 minutes before bed listing your top 3 priorities for the next day. It gives you a clear focus and reduces morning stress.
Plan Your Day the Night Before
Constant notifications can steal your focus. Mute non-essential alerts and create a workspace free from interruptions.
When a task can be done quickly, tackle it immediately instead of adding it to your to-do list. This helps keep your list manageable.
Working non-stop can drain your energy. Break up your tasks into 25-minute focused sessions followed by short breaks to stay energized.
